Notes: Single UPDATE adds an A RR for y.campus.edu. and then deletes that exact RR in the same message, with no prerequisites. The follow-up QUERY checks the final state of y.campus.edu. to distinguish sequential application from net-change or rejection semantics.

Steps.Description: Add y.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.21 and then delete the same RR in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset exists after the UPDATE.
